title: Cannot reorder answers in a single-select question
excerpt:
I’m unable to reorder my answers on a multiple choice single-select question. I’m trying to alphabetize them, so it currently looks similar to: 

A
B
D
E
C

posts.author: bcbird (Brian Birdsong)
posts.cookedHtml:
I’m unable to reorder my answers on a multiple choice single-select question. I’m trying to alphabetize them, so it currently looks similar to:

  • A
  • B
  • D
  • E
  • C

But when I try to move/drag the items it gives me an icon (circle with a line through it) and wont let me move them. If there was a built in to alphabetize this would also be great. Other questions on the same form let me do this, but this particular question has much more answers to choose from on it - 26.

posts.author: malia.monday (Malia)
posts.cookedHtml: Hey Brian! Would you mind trying to rearrange the labels within the column associated with the question to see if that adjusts the order on the form?

posts.author: bcbird (Brian Birdsong)
posts.cookedHtml:
I believe that works! Thanks for your recommendation

It would still be helpful if an easy way of alphabetizing existed. Also, each time you rearrange a label, it kicks you out of editing them - which for moving dozens around is slightly painful

posts.author: bcbird (Brian Birdsong)
posts.cookedHtml: Hey again, the day after the changes didn’t stick and reverted back

posts.author: malia.monday (Malia)
posts.cookedHtml: Hey Brian! Hmmm to confirm, the changes didn’t stick in the column or did the changes remain in the column, but the order reverted on the form?

posts.author: bcbird (Brian Birdsong)
posts.cookedHtml: Sorry for delayed response, they didn’t stay ordered on either end - BUT I tried doing it again, and then went into edit on form and resaved there and it seems to have stuck this time around. Unsure if that made the difference, but it was the one thing I did differently this go around. Its been good for roughly a week

posts.author: malia.monday (Malia)
posts.cookedHtml: Thanks for the follow-up! I’m glad to hear the changes seem to have stuck this time. That said, please reach out if there are any unexpected changes!
